text.title: Graph RAG in Production Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the GraphRAG service handling live production traffic with SLO + cost constraints?

conclusion.verdict: Deploy full stack: router + cache + delta stream + observability.
Deploy router + cache + observability; skip delta stream.
Add hard cost caps + alerting on top of routing/caching.

example.trace: production_traffic=true → incremental_updates=true → full stack with delta events + cost caps.
